{{Short description|Pornographic film award category}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=June 2023}}
{{Infobox award
| name           = [[AVN Award]] for Best Supporting Actress
| image          = 
| caption        = 
| awarded_for    = Best Supporting Actress
| presenter      = [[AVN Media Network]]
| country        = United States
| year           = {{start date|1984}}<ref name="avnwin1984">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140116182259/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1984 |title=1984 AVN Awards Show - History|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|archivedate=January 16, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1984 |accessdate=May 3, 2015}}</ref>
| holder         = Chloe Surreal
| website        = {{url|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}

The '''[[AVN Award]] for Best Supporting Actress''' is an award that has been given by [[sex industry]] company ''[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]'' since the award ceremony's inception in 1984.<ref name="avnwin1984"/> As of January 2026, the titleholder is Chloe Surreal.

==Winners and nominees==
{{dablink|NOTE: '''(f)ilm''' and '''(v)ideo''' were used as separate categories in most years prior to 2009.}}

|-

! Photo
